retained_observations.retained_reason: Strict-preview burn-down is intentionally tracked as broad lint/type debt rather than deleted from local evidence.
retained_observations.next_action: Continue strict-preview burn-down through lint/type uplift work.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when strict-preview audit reports no full-scope burn-down blockers or the item is superseded by a narrower registered observation.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Strict-preview zero-burn and command identity normalization remain broad runtime semantics work; current release and external-report closeout did not implement that full scope.
retained_observations.next_action: Finish strict-preview zero-burn with strict-preview audit, then implement command identity normalization under focused tests before making it a release currentness rule.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when strict-preview zero-burn and command identity normalization have source-backed tests or a replacement registered observation owns the remaining scope.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Report-contract all-lane cost governance still needs duration budget reporting and explicit current-check routing beyond the xdist and currentness improvements already made.
retained_observations.next_action: Reserve the all-lane for checkpoint or CI proof, add duration budget reporting for broad gates, and keep local external-report drift behind refresh or current-check contracts.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when report-contract all-lane reports deterministic duration budget status and has explicit current-check routing separate from final proof.

retained_observations.retained_reason: The default fast lane still needs a changed-path cost planner; current work established proof ordering but did not add the minimal target planner.
retained_observations.next_action: Extend workflow dependency and test-lane metadata to emit the minimal authoritative Make target and duration budget before expensive pytest lanes.
retained_observations.exit_condition: Close when changed-path planner output selects minimal advisory commands, reports budget status, and states that full release proof remains required.

retained_observations.retained_reason: Release-run-ready planning is improved and in use, but registry-backed planner reason codes and duration budgets for expensive gates remain future hardening.
retained_observations.next_action: Extend release-run-ready and release-evidence planner outputs with duration summaries and changed-fingerprint reason codes while preserving release-run-ready as final authority.
